data.body: Completion evidence — all four close_class classifications ARE asserted, split across the two committed test files (held-out-TDD structure; both run in CI, change #825 Verified+1): regression + undetermined in tests/scripts/test_backfill_bug_class.py (test_revert_bug_backfills_regression, test_plain_closed_bug_backfills_undetermined); plan_defect + env_integration in the committed companion tests/scripts/test_backfill_bug_class_heldout.py (test_block_backfills_plan_defect, test_gate_error_backfills_env_integration). The '_heldout' file is a normal, committed, green test module — 'held out' refers to withholding it from the implementer during TDD, not excluding it from the suite. All four exact-value close_class asserts pass.
